name: Runtime Context Loader
description: A deterministic runtime-context reader that turns graph runtime metadata into an auditable context_package with source refs, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Runtime Context
inputSchema.description: Optional graph runtime context object. When omitted, the tool reads the runtime context passed by the graph runtime.

inputSchema.name: Selected Keys
inputSchema.description: Optional ordered list of runtime context keys or dot paths to include.

inputSchema.name: Source Run ID
inputSchema.description: Optional graph run id associated with the runtime context.

outputSchema.name: Runtime Context Report
outputSchema.description: Runtime context keys, source refs, budget, and warnings.
